_readme: KDE Plasma package configuration. Read by extras/kde.sh when desktop.kde=true in install.json.
_shell_help: KDE Plasma shell + SDDM display manager.
_apps_help: KDE applications — apps built on KDE Frameworks.
_apps_list_help: Individual KDE apps. Set to false to skip, true to install.
_extra_help: Any additional KDE-framework packages to install.
